ksa_text: Conduct data and AI due diligence assessments for M&A and investment transactions, including data asset evaluation, technical architecture review, AI risk assessment, key person risk assessment, and integration planning.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Leadership & Strategy is an edge domain for the VP Analytics, this task KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.466) and conceptual alignment to include at the vp level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.466). External reviewers may question whether this specific task KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the VP Analytics versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: while the domain is relevant, this specific task KSA is better attributed to a more specialized adjacent role. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Initially included but overturned through adversarial review. Leadership & Strategy task KSA does not meet the quality or scope threshold for the VP Analytics after cross-framework validation.
